name: io.github.BrendanL79/spudcoach
title: Brotato Coach
description: Deterministic Brotato theorycrafter MCP server: facts and math, not guesses.

environmentVariables.name: SPUDCOACH_DATA
environmentVariables.description: Path to a locally built brotato.json dataset (see README for how to build one — the game data itself is never distributed). Equivalent to the --data CLI flag.
